summary: FPV drones destroyed a Russian Black Sea Fleet Ka-27 helicopter on the "Sivash" drilling platform, with strikes also launched from an unmanned surface vessel controlled via Starlink. Ukrainian paratroopers and jaeger units conducted a joint evacuation of a wounded soldier on the Pokrovsk axis. Russian forces reported 128 targets destroyed on March 5, 2026, including Ukrainian tanks, self-propelled howitzers, and personnel, using FPV anti-drone operations and strikes in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman. A FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK guidance, filmed by an optical fiber FPV drone, struck Ukrainian positions in Krasny Liman.
